title: conyza filaginoides
intro: Conyza filaginoides, also known as bushy fleabane, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Americas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Conyza filaginoides include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of digestive issues, as well as acting as a natural antiseptic and antifungal agent. Conyza filaginoides can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
